creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #2)

Thanks for a reply, much appreciated. By intercepted I mean that after Fn + key does not give any output in xev. Fn or other keys do. 

What I find strange is the combination still works - unless intelkms (vt) is loaded or X. And once it stops, it affects only brightness (that is Fn + PgUP works).

$ /usr/bin/backlight - and
$ /usr/bin/backlight + still work in X - albeit they are missing fine granularity of Fn + home/End (that is '-' gives black screen in two steps and '+' is very bright in one).
